name: Shiitake Saute
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove and discard the tough mushroom stems. Cut the caps into wedges.
2. Heat the oil in a skillet over medium heat.
3. Add the mushrooms to the skillet and stir-fry until they are almost tender.
4. Add the mirin, soy sauce, and sugar. Toss everything together to coat the mushrooms evenly.
